component.name: NV Broadcast
component.summary: AI-powered virtual camera with background removal and meeting transcription

description.p: NV Broadcast brings NVIDIA Broadcast features to Linux. AI-powered virtual camera with background removal, eye contact correction, face relighting, voice studio, and meeting transcription — all running locally on your GPU.

ul.li: Background blur, replace, or remove with 3 AI models
Eye contact correction — look at camera while reading your screen
Face relighting — auto-match face lighting to background
Voice studio — bass, treble, warmth, compression with GPU acceleration
AI meeting transcription — local Whisper, no cloud
AI meeting summarizer — action items, questions, key points
Recording with NVENC hardware encoding to MP4
9 processing modes from 48fps Killer to CPU fallback
5 built-in profiles: Meeting, Streaming, Presentation, Gaming, Clean
Works with Zoom, Chrome, OBS, Discord, FaceTime
AI meeting summarizer (action items, key points)
Voice studio with 6 presets and GPU acceleration
Audio VU meter and mic test

description.p: Eye contact, relighting, Apple-like UI, profiles, macOS support
9 processing modes, edge refinement, video enhancement, system tray
